channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Drones have created a new energy security landscape
item.description: The wars in Iran and Ukraine show how the drone tech revolution makes it easier — and cheaper — to interrupt energy supplies by striking refineries an...

item.title: Trump to meet Netanyahu at the White House on Tuesday amid Iran escalation
item.description: President Trump will meet Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House on Tuesday, the Israeli Prime Minister's office said in a state...

item.title: Dem panel taps South Carolina to hold first 2028 presidential primary
item.description: South Carolina has been preliminarily tapped to hold the first Democratic presidential primary of 2028, as a key panel of party leaders picked the Pal...

item.title: Scoop: U.S. and U.K. planning international conference on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and U.K. are planning to convene a high-level meeting in London next week that will focus on a potential international coalition to protect m...
